memoryArtifacts.headline: Danvers, Robert  ca. 1400-1467
memoryArtifacts.description:
Robert Danvers
1420 admitted Lincolns Inn
1428 a governor of Lincolns Inn
1436 Member of Parliament for Oxford
ca. 1437- assists Archbishop Chicheley in establishing All Souls College, Oxford 
1442 Re …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Danvers於1404年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾阿德維爾時，他的父親John d'Anvers II22歲，母親Alice Verney20歲。他於1440年與Agnes de La Bere在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1467年4月17日在英國英格蘭倫敦韋斯特 斯米費爾德享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 巴沙洛繆 馮 雷斯。

nameMeanings.name: Danvers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): of Norman origin, a habitational name with fused preposition d(e) for someone from Anvers, the French name of the port of Antwerp in what is now Belgium.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Danvers was born in 1404, in Adwell, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John d'Anvers II, was 22 and his mother, Alice Verney, was 20. He married Agnes de La Bere in 1440, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 17 April 1467, in West Smithfield, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in St Bartholomew the Less, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.St Bartholomew the Less, London, England: St Bartholomew the Less, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Danvers est né en 1404, à Adwell, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John d'Anvers II, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Alice Verney, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de La Bere en 1440, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 17 avril 1467, à West Smithfield, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à St Bartholomew the Less, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Danvers 1404 in Adwell, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John d'Anvers II 22 und seine Mutter Alice Verney 20. Er hat 1440 in London, England Agnes de La Bere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 17. April 1467 im Alter von 63 Jahren in West Smithfield, London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Bartholomew the Less, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Danversが1404年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアアドウエルで生まれた時，父John d'Anvers IIは22歳，母Alice Verneyは20歳であった。1440年にイギリスロンドンでAgnes de La Bereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1467年4月17日にイギリスイギリスロンドンウエスト スミスフィールドで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンスト バーソロメウ ス レスにて埋葬された。

ko.St Bartholomew the Less, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 바토롬w 테 레스
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Danvers(이)가 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 아드웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John d'Anvers II(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Verney(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1440년 영국 런던에서 Agnes de La Bere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1467년 4월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트 스미스필드에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 바토롬w 테 레스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Danvers nasceu em 1404, em Adwell, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John d'Anvers II, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Alice Verney, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de La Bere em 1440, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de abril de 1467, em West Smithfield, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em St Bartholomew the Less, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Bartholomew the Less, London, England: ст бартоломю т лесс, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Danvers родился в 1404 г. в местности адвелл, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John d'Anvers II было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Verney, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de La Bere в 1440 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 17 апреля 1467 г. в местности вест смитфиелд, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности ст бартоломю т лесс, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Danvers nació en 1404, en Adwell, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John d'Anvers II, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Alice Verney, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Agnes de La Bere en 1440, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 17 de abril de 1467, en West Smithfield, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en St Bartholomew the Less, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
